probeMetadata.bugUnderInvestigation: Idle/realtime/auth issue - app shows only shared list and auth/realtime errors are visible/looping
testApproach: Authenticated via Playwright using test credentials (e2e-test@gatherlists.com)
Created 3 test lists to populate the account (My Groceries, Weekly Shopping, Party Supplies)
Monitored console for 30+ seconds looking for auth, realtime, websocket errors
Captured screenshots of UI state at multiple phases
Checked for error loop behavior (>5 errors in monitoring period)

codeAnalysis.note: No code changes requested - observational inspection only

probeMetadata.conclusion: The reported 'idle/realtime/auth' issue was NOT reproducible in this testing session.
possibleExplanations: Test account had no SHARED lists - the 'only shared list showing' scenario could not be tested
Issue may be intermittent or require longer idle periods (5+ minutes)
Issue may be specific to certain network conditions or Supabase server state
Issue may only occur with lists containing items (not empty lists)
Issue may be browser/device specific and not reproducible in headless Playwright
Issue may have been resolved by recent code changes
recommendations: Test with an account that has BOTH owned AND shared lists to reproduce the specific scenario
Have user capture browser console screenshot when issue occurs
Test with lists containing items to trigger realtime sync activity
Consider extended idle monitoring (5-10 minutes) for idle-state issues
Check if issue is specific to PWA/mobile mode vs desktop browser

previousProbe.bugUnderInvestigation: Race condition: switching between shopping lists sometimes shows stale items from previous list
previousProbe.conclusion: NOT reproducible - subscription cleanup/setup working correctly
